auth.confirmLink: Follow the link to confirm your account.
auth.subtitle: Family motivation system
auth.joinFamily: Second parent, or a kid with their own account? Join with an invite code →
auth.kidLoginLink: Kid without an account? Log in with the family code + PIN →

authHelp.title: How sign-in works in FamilyCoins
authHelp.step1Body: Email + password or Google, right on this page → you create a family → you get an invite code (visible in Settings → Family).
authHelp.step2Body: One shared code per family, it doesn't change. Needed once: for a second parent, or a kid with their own account, on the "Have an invite code?" screen. After that they just sign in normally with email/Google.
authHelp.step3Title: 3. PIN — for a kid without an account
authHelp.step3Body: You set a PIN (4–6 digits) for the kid in Settings → Children. From then on they sign in themselves on the "Are you a kid?" screen: family code → their name → PIN.
authHelp.step4Title: 4. Both at once, if you want
authHelp.step4Body: If a kid already has a Google/email account, you can still set a PIN for them. Both sign-in methods work at the same time — the kid picks whichever's convenient.

onboarding.welcomeDesc: FamilyCoins helps children learn responsibility and achieve goals through a coin and reward system. Parents set rules — children earn coins for studies, sports, and chores. Exchange coins for real rewards!
